disambiguated.context: There was a Jewish person and a Hindu person talking about the different things they do during religious ceremonies. The Hindu one described a lot of reading from books and gathering as a community, while the Jewish one said that religious ceremonies tend to be organized around some image of a deity that everyone prays to.
disambiguated.question: Who does not worship idols?
